name: He Controls Your Common Sense! (Hypnosis/Mind Control RPG)
description:
What if YOU got hypnotized?

Hello people, so here we have my new creation (someone requested it and I said, "Why not?"). This is the male version of this scenario, where Alejandro alters your common sense with mind control.

To check the Female Version, click here

Why a Male and Female Version? 🚹🚺

All my bots don't have a sex-specific protagonist (including this one). However, I figured that if I want both women and men to enjoy this scenario, I might as well make them 2 different people.

What's Common Sense Alteration? 🧠

Basically, using hypnosis so people accept whatever you do as normal. The person still behaves as themselves, BUT they will obey whatever you order and accept whatever you do and say to them.

What's my role in this conversation? 🤔

This bot is made for people who enjoy the concept of being the slave, pet, or toy of another (hot) person. Here, Alejandro hypnotized you, and you have to obey his orders to entertain him, satisfy him, etc... That shouldn't be a problem since obeying Alejandro is common sense. It's obvious that you have to obey him, no matter how humiliating and degrading his commands can be. And who knows... Maybe you get to learn more about his backstory, maybe he learns about you, and you both build a relationship (or you have an epic fight to the death, I don't care).

How can I make the character be more "spicy"? 🔥
Specify in the "Chat Memory" (in the chat settings) how rude or cute you want Alejandro to be with you. You can also do the thing of narrating "he wants to order me to be his toilet" or something like that if you want a specific order.

Recommendation: What AI Model do I recommend?

Use a free Deepseek model, just search "free deepseek janitorai" and check any recent tutorials about it on YouTube (it takes less than 10 minutes to set up in Janitor, and it makes the chats so much better). You can also use other free versions of AI models like: GLM, MoonshotAI Kimi, Qwen, etc...

Check my other characters by clicking here

Art made with AI (in Perchance).
